name: prospect-weekly-hermes-install-plan

timezone_strategy.rationale: Hermes cron stores UTC cron expressions. The job fires at both UTC hours that can correspond to Saturday 23:00 America/Chicago across CDT/CST; the wake gate suppresses the non-matching hour before the agent runs.

install_steps: Copy tenants/hermes-mitchel/scripts/prospect-weekly-central-gate.sh to /opt/data/scripts/prospect-weekly-central-gate.sh and make it executable.
Merge the disabled jobs below into /opt/data/cron/jobs.json only after on-demand smokes and explicit operator approval.
Keep enabled=false until the final enable step; do not modify existing paused AGS enrichment jobs.
After install, verify both jobs remain disabled until explicit enable approval.

jobs.name: Trevor missing-email enrichment weekly rerun
jobs.prompt: Weekly Trevor missing-email enrichment rerun. The pre-run script has already confirmed it is Saturday 23:00 America/Chicago. Policy: process newly queued, retryable error, or stale claimed enrichment work for prospects still missing email; do not reset completed no_email_found or needs_review rows without a separate reviewed retry policy. Required flow: 1. Call seed_prospect_email_enrichment_queue with source_batch=ags_prospect_import, source_label=AGS, reset_claimed_older_than_minutes=1440. 2. Call get_prospect_email_enrichment_summary for source_batch=ags_prospect_import. 3. Call process_prospect_email_enrichment_batch with source_batch=ags_prospect_import, limit=10, claimed_by=hermes-weekly-missing-email. 4. Never fabricate emails. Never send outbound messages. 5. End with status counts, remaining_count, and any warnings.
jobs.paused_reason: Disabled install plan; enable only after explicit operator approval.

jobs.name: Trevor prospect deep research weekly pass
jobs.prompt: Weekly Trevor prospect deep research pass. The pre-run script has already confirmed it is Saturday 23:00 America/Chicago. Required parent flow: 1. Call claim_prospect_research_batch with limit=10. 2. Use delegate_task in batch mode with up to three leaf child agents at a time. Create child tasks with role=leaf and toolsets=["web"] for source-finder, rdap-domain-verifier, and evidence-quality-reviewer work. Child role source-finder: search public web sources for official site/contact page, city/town/chamber directory, credible business listing, and credible news or business context for the assigned prospects. Child role rdap-domain-verifier: use public RDAP/WHOIS only to verify domain plausibility, registration status, or age for domains found by source-finder; never treat registrar abuse, privacy proxy, or registrant emails as outreach contacts. Child role evidence-quality-reviewer: review child findings for name/address/phone match strength, ambiguity, source type, confidence, and concise search-location notes; reject weak or mismatched evidence. Do not ask child agents to call store_prospect_research_evidence, update Trevor records, create outreach tasks, or send outbound messages. 3. After children return, the parent job must store only concise source-attributed findings that pass the quality gate with store_prospect_research_evidence. 4. Leave evidence pending_review unless a human/operator separately reviews it. 5. Do not update trevor.prospects.email or prospect notes. Do not create outreach tasks. Do not send outbound messages. 6. End with claimed prospect count, delegated child count, stored evidence count, rejected/ambiguous count, and warnings.
jobs.paused_reason: Disabled install plan; enable only after explicit operator approval.
